contract.title: Software Development Services Agreement
contract.description: Agreement between TechCorp and DevStudio for development of a mobile application.
contract.governingLaw: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California.
contract.renewalTerms: May be renewed by mutual written agreement of both parties.

clauses.title: Scope of Services
clauses.text: DevStudio shall develop a mobile application for TechCorp as described in Exhibit A. DevStudio will provide project management, UI/UX design, backend development, and QA testing.

clauses.title: Compensation
clauses.text: TechCorp shall pay DevStudio a fixed fee of $150,000 USD, payable in three milestones: $50,000 upon signing, $50,000 upon alpha delivery, and $50,000 upon final acceptance.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property
clauses.text: All work product created under this Agreement shall be the sole and exclusive property of TechCorp. DevStudio assigns all right, title, and interest in the work product to TechCorp.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Each party agrees to hold the other's Confidential Information in strict confidence for a period of three years from the date of disclosure.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: Neither party shall be liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages. DevStudio's total liability shall not exceed the total fees paid under this Agreement.

clauses.title: Termination for Convenience
clauses.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon 30 days written notice. In the event of termination, TechCorp shall pay DevStudio for all work completed through the termination date.

obligations.description: Develop mobile application as described in Exhibit A.
Pay $50,000 upon signing of the agreement.
Pay $50,000 upon final acceptance of work product.
Assign all intellectual property rights in work product to TechCorp.
Maintain confidentiality for three years from disclosure.
Maintain confidentiality for three years from disclosure.

paymentSchedule.condition: Upon successful alpha delivery and acceptance
Upon final acceptance of all work product

risks.description: Limitation of liability caps DevStudio's liability at fees paid, which may be insufficient if IP breach occurs.
risks.impact: TechCorp may have limited recourse if DevStudio misappropriates third-party IP in the work product.

risks.description: No express warranty clause found — DevStudio may not be contractually obligated to deliver defect-free work.
risks.impact: TechCorp may lack recourse for buggy or non-conforming deliverables.

risks.description: 30-day termination for convenience may leave DevStudio without compensation for work in progress if TechCorp terminates mid-sprint.
risks.impact: DevStudio may not recover full value of work completed but not yet delivered.

definitions.definition: Non-public information disclosed by one party to the other, including but not limited to business plans, technical data, and customer information.
All deliverables, software code, designs, documentation, and other materials created by DevStudio under this Agreement.
